prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约 113880→88126→69662→47548→124772，2021–2024 年呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），但 2025 年因新高考改革分物理类/历史类后，物理类最低位次大幅后移至约 124772 名，主要受中外合作办学项目（园艺中新实验班等）低分专业组影响；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021 年 179 人、2022 年 183 人、2023 年 169 人、2024 年 176 人、2025 年 194 人；2026 年计划 212 人，较 2025 年扩招约 9.3%，扩招幅度明显，理论上使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第 116–122 名，2026 年回升至第 120 名，整体层次稳定，属中游偏上 211；该校在声誉舆情文件中未出现显著正负面事件，声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第 95 位，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量中等偏低，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中食品科学与工程为 A-，为该校唯一 A- 及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度高热/推荐，该校相关专业（计算机类、电气类、数据科学与大数据技术等）受益于行业热度；河南省 2026 年考生总数约 120 万人（数据标注「不确定」），按近年物理类占比约 61% 估算，2026 年物理类考生约 73.4 万人，较 2025 年 55.5 万人大幅增加约 32%，竞争显著加剧；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距河南省较远，地域偏好偏弱；该校在河南省招生规模较大（2026 年物理类 212 人），属外省高校在豫招生较多的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年物理类因新高考改革导致最低位次大幅后移至约 124772 名的特殊背景、2026 年扩招约 9.3% 使竞争略有加剧、河南省物理类考生数大幅增加约 32% 使竞争显著加剧，以及该校声誉平稳、专业热度分化等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准上继续后移，预测最低位次约 131518 名，区间 131018–132018 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 113880 → 88126 → 69662 → 47548 → 124772. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), but in 2025, after the new college entrance examination reform divided into physics/history categories, the minimum ranking for physics category significantly dropped to about 124772, mainly affected by low-score major groups in Sino-foreign cooperative education programs (e.g., Horticulture Sino-New Zealand Experimental Class). The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province: 179 in 2021, 183 in 2022, 169 in 2023, 176 in 2024, 194 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 212, an increase of about 9.3% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, theoretically making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking in recent years is approximately 116–122, rising to 120th in 2026, with a stable overall level, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the university has no significant positive or negative events in reputation public opinion files, with a stable reputation; Douyin popularity total ranking is 95th, rated as 'average', with medium-low short video exposure, showing no obvious signs of increased application attention; no record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering is rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in enrollment majors, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information/Communication have high social popularity/recommendation; the university's related majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.) benefit from industry popularity; the total number of examinees in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (data marked as 'uncertain'), estimated based on the recent physics category proportion of about 61%, the number of physics category examinees in 2026 is about 734,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 555,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Henan Province, with weak regional preference; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan Province (212 in physics category in 2026), making it one of the universities from other provinces with higher enrollment in Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the special background of the 2025 physics category minimum ranking significantly dropping to about 124,772 due to the new college entrance examination reform, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.3% slightly intensifying competition, the significant increase of about 32% in the number of physics category examinees in Henan Province sharply intensifying competition, and the university's stable reputation and differentiated major popularity, it is expected that the 2026 minimum ranking will continue to drop based on the 2025 baseline, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 131,518, range 131,018–132,018.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 131,018–132,018, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 130,000), you can focus on popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; if your ranking is in the middle of the range, pay attention to advantageous or characteristic majors such as Food Science and Engineering (A- discipline), Water Resources Engineering, and Energy and Power Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, consider relatively easy-to-enter majors such as Plant Production and Animal Production.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 5874→6099→6256→8497→19144, showing an overall backward trend (increasing ranking numbers). In 2024, the ranking shifted backward by about 2241 places compared to 2023. In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform dividing the history category, the minimum ranking significantly shifted backward to about 19144, mainly affected by the low-score major group of the Sino-foreign cooperative education project (Business Administration China-US 121 Dual Degree Program). The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province: 19 students in 2021, 19 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 24 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 34 students, an increase of about 41.7% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking in recent years is approximately 116–122, rising to 120th in 2026, with a stable overall level. In reputation public opinion documents, no significant positive or negative events were found, and the reputation is stable. Douyin heat total ranking is 95th, rated as 'average', with no obvious signs of increased application attention. Food Science and Engineering is rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, but the liberal arts/history category enrollment majors (Business Administration, Finance, Administrative Management, Chinese International Education, etc.) have low relevance to this advantageous discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Business Administration and Finance show a divided and wait-and-see social popularity, with overall average heat. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (data marked as 'uncertain'), and estimated by the recent history category proportion of about 39%, the 2026 history category examinees are about 468,000, a significant increase of about 33% compared to 352,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Henan Province, with weak regional preference. The university's enrollment scale for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province is small (34 students in 2026), which is a medium scale among out-of-province universities recruiting in Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the special background of the 2025 history category minimum ranking significantly shifting backward to about 19144 due to the new college entrance examination reform, the 2026 large enrollment expansion of about 41.7% intensifying competition, the significant increase of about 33% in Henan Province history category examinees further intensifying competition, as well as the low relevance of the university's liberal arts majors to its advantageous disciplines and the divided popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the 2026 minimum ranking will continue to shift backward based on the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 23830, with a range of 23330–24330.

If your ranking is in the middle of the range, focus on economics and management majors such as Finance and Business Administration.
